name: cache-storm
title: Cache storm - 200 identical requests, 40-way concurrent

messages.content: What does an LLM gateway do?

narrative: Every request is identical and cache-eligible (temperature 0, no streaming). The first wave misses and reaches a backend (~40ms simulated inference); everything after is served straight from Redis in about a millisecond. The driver times one MISS and one HIT so the speedup is a number, not a claim.
watch: Grafana: 'Cache lookups by result', 'Chat completion p95 by cache outcome', and the hit-ratio stat.
